description_long: This is a round, woven handbag crafted from natural rattan or wicker, featuring a tightly interlaced pattern across its body. The bag is circular in shape with a flat base and a slightly domed top, giving it a basket-like appearance. Two sturdy, semi-rigid handles are attached symmetrically at the top, made from a lighter, smooth material, likely bent wood or reinforced rattan. The front and back surfaces display a concentric woven motif, with the back side showing a subtle starburst pattern radiating from the center. The closure mechanism is a simple loop and peg system, with a small loop of material hooking over a horizontal bar to secure the bag. The overall finish is matte, with a natural beige and tan coloration, and no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments.
description: A round, woven rattan handbag with dual bent-wood handles and a simple loop closure, featuring a concentric and starburst woven pattern in natural beige tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular woven body, dual handles, and the loop closure mechanism.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handbag's narrow profile and the parallel arrangement of the two handles.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the starburst woven pattern and the attachment points of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thickness and handle alignment.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, semi-rigid handles made from bent wood or rattan, non-adjustable, attached at the top with visible knots.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Loop and peg closure located at the top center, with a small loop hooking over a horizontal bar.
attribute_pattern: Concentric woven pattern on the front, starburst woven pattern on the back.
